reviews.review_title: I am unable to try out this game
reviews.review_description: By the looks of this game, it looks like it could have potential, but as it stands of today, it won't let me move forward. I have uninstalled and reinstalled, hoping that will correct the problem the issue is still there . By the way, I'm on the Oculus Quest 2 VR headset . I hope the devs did not give up on this game. Sending Positive Vibes their way. I hope you guys are having a great day. Please stay safe.
